description: Perform a Log-Linear Regression analysis on the 'TitanicSurvival.csv' dataset to test if the association between 'survived', 'sex', and 'passengerClass' is adequately modeled using all main effects and all two-way interactions, excluding the three-way interaction. Ensure the variables are treated as nominal. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/TitanicLogLinear.omv and create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/loglinear_report.txt. The report must contain exactly four lines: the model Deviance (rounded to 2 decimal places), the Degrees of Freedom, the p-value (rounded to 4 decimal places), and the word 'ADEQUATE' if the model fits (p > 0.05) or 'INADEQUATE' if it does not (p <= 0.05).
